Homes from creators we love

FOLLOW US
  1. The Shiro table and chairs have such a calm, natural feel, and paired with the LED parasol for those cosy evenings (can't wait to see the glow)… it’s my new favourite spot 🌿
    @welcometoourhome21
  2. ☀️ Anyone else like this when the sun comes out? I’m sorry but if you need me I’ll be faffing in my garden 🪴 The Aspen 8 seater set from Laura James Home is a gorgeous set that can extend when you have extra, unexpected guests. Perfect for summer BBQs ✨
    @thecountryreno
  3. How gorgeous is this? As you might know, I went to Ibiza last year with @laura.james.home for a sneak peek at their new garden collection and I completely fell in love with this set.
    @home_across_the_swale
  4. When I first saw the @laura.james.home 2026 garden collection in Ibiza, I knew it would be a HARD decision picking which set I wanted for my pergola area. But I am so happy with my choice, this is the Haryln 6 seater wooden dining set with Killian chairs - I am obsessed👌🏽
    @thegranarybarnfarm
  5. There's something about a sleek, clean garden aesthetic that feels so timeless. Now that the weather is getting warmer, I'm starting to dream about the longer evenings; dining outside with a chilled glass of wine and enjoying good company in the garden.
    @thestylepad_uk
  6. We went for the Aspen 8 Seater Wooden Garden Dining Set, with cream cushions and it looks so gorgeous that I can’t wait to get back out there with some BBQs this summer. I’ve also got my eye on some other Laura James Home furniture so watch this space!!
    @thecountryreno
1 / of 6

Don't just take our word for it 🌟⁠ ⁠ From fire pit evenings to lazy sunny afternoons, our customers are loving their Laura James sets this summer. Amazing quality, beautiful designs and spaces they are completely obsessed with. That is what we are all about 🥹☀️⁠ ⁠ Tap to shop our top picks for outdoor living!⁠ .⁠ .⁠ .⁠ #laurajames #gardeninspo #outdoorliving #gardengoals #customerlove #gardensofa #outdoordining #summergarden
May 22
laura.james.home
"Step into your garden and feel away from the outside world." 🌿✨⁠ ⁠ We could not have said it better ourselves. A corner sofa, a dining table, a fire pit and the people you love most around you. That is what summer is all about. @thehomeofjade is speaking our language and we are here for every word 🥹⁠ ⁠ Sound like your kind of summer? Shop NEW IN GARDEN via the link in bio.⁠ .⁠ .⁠ .⁠ #laurajames #gardeninspo #outdoorliving #gardenretreat #summergarden #gardengoals #outdoorentertaining #akirasofaset
May 20
laura.james.home
Ballet pink works beautifully as a statement or a whisper 💗⁠ ⁠ We've styled six rooms to show you how versatile this shade can be, from living spaces to bedrooms, gardens to shelves.⁠ ⁠ Read the full styling guide via the link in bio.⁠ .⁠ .⁠ .⁠ #laurajames #balletpink #pinkinteriors #interiordesign #homedecor #luxuryliving #interiorinspiration #homestyling
May 19

✨ We've been nominated again! ✨⁠ ⁠ We're absolutely thrilled to share that Laura James is back in the running for Best Furniture Retailer at the uFurnish Home Awards!⁠ ⁠ Last year was our very first nomination and thanks to the most amazing community, we took home the award. We are so grateful and would love your support again this year 🫶🤍⁠ ⁠ 👉 Tap the voting link in our bio to cast your vote⁠ 🥰 It only takes a sec, and it truly means the world to us!⁠ .⁠ .⁠ .⁠ #homeawards #furniturelove #laurajames #votenow #interiorinspo #furnituregoals #bestfurnitureretailer #awardseason
